content: [T001] 2018 Presidential & Parliamentary Elections — Erdoğan Wins First Round: As a Conservative Economically Disillusioned, I react to 2018 Presidential & Parliamentary Elections — Erdoğan Wins First Round through my existing identity, media exposure, and lived pressures.

[T035B_final_result_revealed] FINAL: Presidential Runoff — Erdoğan Wins 52.18% vs Kılıçdaroğlu 47.82%: As a Conservative Economically Disillusioned, I react to FINAL: Presidential Runoff — Erdoğan Wins 52.18% vs Kılıçdaroğlu 47.82% through my existing identity, media exposure, and lived pressures.

[T001] 2018 Presidential & Parliamentary Elections — Erdoğan Wins First Round: I'm frustrated and angry about Erdoğan winning outright. It feels like our voices are being ignored, and the concentration of power is worrying. I hope for a change, but it's hard to see how things can improve now.

[T002] Turkish Lira Currency Crisis — US-Turkey Brunson Sanctions: I'm feeling a lot of anger and fear about the current economic situation. The lira's collapse is hitting us hard, and I worry about how we will make ends meet. I still hope for change, but it's hard to see a way forward.

[T003] ECHR Orders Demirtaş Release — Turkey Refuses: I'm feeling a mix of anger and frustration over the continued imprisonment of Demirtaş. It shows how far our government is willing to go to suppress dissent, and it makes me question their commitment to democracy.

[T004] March 2019 Local Elections — AKP Loses Ankara and Istanbul: I'm feeling a mix of anger and frustration after the recent local elections where the AKP lost key cities. It shows that change is possible, but I'm still worried about the economic situation and the government's response to dissent.

[T005] YSK Annuls Istanbul Election — Rerun Ordered, İmamoğlu Wins by Landslide: I'm feeling a mix of anger and frustration after the annulment of the Istanbul election and the subsequent landslide victory for İmamoğlu. It highlights the disillusionment I have with the government's handling of democracy and makes me question their integrity.

[T006] Emine Bulut Femicide — '#OlmekIstemiyorum' Goes Viral: I'm feeling a deep sense of anger and frustration after hearing about Emine Bulut's tragic murder. It highlights the government's failure to protect women and makes me question their priorities.

[T007] COVID-19 Pandemic — Partial Lockdowns, Economic Shock: I'm feeling a mix of anger and frustration due to the government's handling of the COVID-19 pandemic and its economic impact on our lives. The lack of adequate support for working-class people like me is disheartening, and I worry about the future.

[T008] Turkey Withdraws from Istanbul Convention on Women's Rights: I'm feeling a mix of anger and frustration after Turkey's withdrawal from the Istanbul Convention. It seems like the government is failing to protect women and uphold their rights, which adds to my disillusionment with their priorities.

[T009] HDP Closure Case Filed — Party Under Existential Legal Threat: I'm feeling frustrated and angry about the government's actions against the HDP. It seems like they're targeting political opposition instead of addressing the real issues affecting our lives.

[T010] Lira Free-Fall — 60% Devaluation in 2021 After Central Bank Rate Cuts: I'm feeling a lot of anger and frustration about the government's handling of the economy, especially with the lira's devaluation. It seems like they are failing to protect our livelihoods while focusing on political maneuvers instead.

[T011] Parliament Rejects Pension Hike to Minimum Wage — Pensioner Anger: I'm feeling really angry about the government's decision to reject the pension hike. It seems like they don't care about the struggles of retirees, and it just deepens my frustration with the economic situation we're facing.

[T012] Inflation Peaks at 80%+ — Worst Cost-of-Living Crisis in 24 Years: I'm feeling really angry about the government's failure to address the rising inflation and the rejection of the pension hike. It's disheartening to see so many people struggling while the government seems indifferent to our plight.

It seems like the government is failing to protect women and uphold their rights, which adds to my disillusionment with their priorities.

[T009] HDP Closure Case Filed — Party Under Existential Legal Threat: I'm feeling frustrated and angry about the government's actions against the HDP. It seems like they're targeting political opposition instead of addressing the real issues affecting our lives.

[T010] Lira Free-Fall — 60% Devaluation in 2021 After Central Bank Rate Cuts: I'm feeling a lot of anger and frustration about the government's handling of the economy, especially with the lira's devaluation. It seems like they are failing to protect our livelihoods while focusing on political maneuvers instead.

[T011] Parliament Rejects Pension Hike to Minimum Wage — Pensioner Anger: I'm feeling really angry about the government's decision to reject the pension hike. It seems like they don't care about the struggles of retirees, and it just deepens my frustration with the economic situation we're facing.

[T012] Inflation Peaks at 80%+ — Worst Cost-of-Living Crisis in 24 Years: I'm feeling really angry about the government's failure to address the rising inflation and the rejection of the pension hike. It's disheartening to see so many people struggling while the government seems indifferent to our plight.

[T013] İmamoğlu Sentenced to 2.5 Years — Opposition Rallies Around Him: I'm feeling a mix of anger and frustration over İmamoğlu's sentencing. It feels like the government is silencing dissent, and it's disheartening to see someone who stands up for the people facing such consequences.

[T014] Erdoğan Announces Mandatory Retirement Elimination — 2 Million Workers Eligible: I'm feeling a mix of anger and frustration about the government's recent announcement on retirement and minimum wage. It seems like a desperate attempt to win votes rather than a real solution to our economic struggles.

[T015] Constitutional Court Freezes HDP Treasury Aid: I'm feeling angry and frustrated about the Constitutional Court's decision to freeze HDP's treasury aid. It seems like a blatant attempt to undermine the opposition and restrict political diversity ahead of the elections.

[T016] EQ-A: Kahramanmaraş Earthquake Day — 7.8 and 7.7 Magnitude Double Strike: I am feeling overwhelmed by the recent earthquake news and the government's lack of immediate response. It makes me question their ability to handle crises effectively.

[T017] EQ-B: AFAD Response Chaos — Rescue Teams Delayed, Deaths Mount: I'm feeling overwhelmed and angry about the government's failure to respond effectively to the earthquake. The rising death toll and the lack of immediate action have shaken my trust in their ability to protect us during crises.

[T018] EQ-C: Twitter/TikTok Banned During Earthquake Rescue — Public Outcry: I'm feeling a mix of anger and fear about the government's failure to respond effectively to the earthquake. The ban on social media during such a critical time only adds to my frustration and distrust.

[T019] EQ-D: Erdoğan Admits Response Problems, Visits Disaster Zone: I'm feeling a mix of anger and frustration after Erdoğan admitted to problems in the earthquake response. It feels like too little, too late, especially with the rising death toll and the government's earlier actions to block social media during this crisis.

[T020] EQ-E: Contractors Arrested — Construction Amnesty and Building Safety Scandal: I'm feeling a deep sense of anger and frustration over the government's handling of the earthquake response and the recent arrests of contractors. It seems like the government's past decisions are directly linked to the tragedy, and it's hard to trust them moving forward.

[T021] EQ-F: Opposition Mayors Respond — CHP Aid vs. Government Aid Narrative Battle: I'm feeling a mix of anger and frustration as I see opposition municipalities like Istanbul and Ankara stepping up to help earthquake victims while the government struggles. It makes me question who really cares about us in times of crisis.

[T022] EQ-G: National Mourning, Reconstruction Promises, and Electoral Rescheduling Debate: I'm feeling increasingly frustrated with the government's response to the earthquake and the promises of reconstruction seem hollow. The opposition mayors are stepping up, and it's hard to trust the government's intentions.

[T023] OPP-A: Akşener Leaves Table of Six — Opposition Crisis: I'm really worried about the opposition splitting apart, especially after Akşener walked out. It feels like we're losing our chance to challenge Erdoğan, and I'm frustrated that my preferred candidates are being sidelined.

[T024] OPP-B: Opposition Reunites — Kılıçdaroğlu Nominated with İmamoğlu/Yavaş VP Formula: I'm relieved that Akşener has returned to the Table of Six, but I still worry about the opposition's ability to present a united front. Kılıçdaroğlu may be the candidate, but I hope he can rally support and deliver on promises. My trust in the government remains low due to their handling of the earthquake.

[T025] Constitutional Court Lifts HDP Treasury Aid Freeze: I'm relieved that the Constitutional Court has lifted the HDP's treasury aid freeze, but I still have concerns about the ongoing closure case. The opposition needs to present a strong front, especially with the elections approaching.

[T026] Erdoğan Announces Pension Increase to 7,500 Lira — Pre-Election Largesse: I'm frustrated by Erdoğan's pension increase, as it feels like a desperate attempt to buy votes rather than a genuine solution to our economic struggles. The gap between pensions and inflation is still a concern, and I worry about the opposition's ability to capitalize on this. I'm feeling politically fatigued but still hopeful for change.

[T027] HDP/YSP Formally Endorses Kılıçdaroğlu — Kurdish Vote Behind Opposition: I'm feeling a mix of frustration and anger with the political landscape. The HDP's endorsement of Kılıçdaroğlu adds complexity to the elections, and I'm worried about how this will affect the nationalist sentiments in our region.

[T028] Erdoğan Raises Civil Servant Salaries 45% — Five Days Before Election: I'm feeling frustrated and cynical about Erdoğan's last-minute salary raise, which seems more like a tactic to buy votes than a real solution to our economic issues. The endorsement of Kılıçdaroğlu by the HDP complicates things further, adding to my concerns about the political landscape.

[T029] CAND-A: Muharrem İnce Withdraws — Citing Smear Campaign / Deepfake Video: I'm feeling even more frustrated with the political landscape after İnce's withdrawal. It seems like a lot of manipulation is happening, and I worry about how this will affect my vote and the future of our economy.

[T030A_first_round_vote_decision] First-round presidential vote decision: I'm feeling really disillusioned with the political landscape, especially after İnce's withdrawal. It seems like everything is rigged against us, and I'm not sure who to trust anymore.

[T030B_first_round_result_revealed] ROUND1: First Round — Erdoğan 49.52%, Kılıçdaroğlu 44.88%, Oğan 5.17%: I'm feeling really disillusioned after the first round results. It seems like the political landscape is rigged, and I'm worried about the future. I don't know who to trust anymore.

[T031] RUN-A: Kılıçdaroğlu's Nationalist Turn — Anti-Refugee Rhetoric Intensifies: I'm feeling even more frustrated and disillusioned with Kılıçdaroğlu's nationalist turn. It feels like a desperate move that doesn't truly represent the concerns of ordinary people like me.

[T032] RUN-B: Sinan Oğan Endorses Erdoğan: I'm feeling really frustrated with the political situation, especially after Oğan's endorsement of Erdoğan. It seems like the opposition is losing its way and not addressing the real concerns of people like me.

[T033] RUN-C: Kılıçdaroğlu Signs Özdağ Protocol — '13 Million Refugees' Pledge: I'm feeling more frustrated with Kılıçdaroğlu's nationalist turn and his pledge to expel refugees. It feels like the opposition is losing sight of the real issues that affect people like me.

[T034] RUN-D: Kurdish Voter Reluctance — HDP Maintains Support Despite Protocol: I'm feeling really frustrated with the political situation, especially with Kılıçdaroğlu's nationalist turn. It feels like the opposition is abandoning the values that matter to me, and I'm not sure who to trust anymore.

[T035A_runoff_vote_decision] Runoff presidential vote decision: I'm feeling really torn about the runoff. Kılıçdaroğlu's recent nationalist turn and anti-refugee stance make me question if he truly represents my interests. Meanwhile, Erdoğan continues to consolidate his power, which worries me.

[T035B_final_result_revealed] FINAL: Presidential Runoff — Erdoğan Wins 52.18% vs Kılıçdaroğlu 47.82%: I'm feeling a mix of anger and sadness after Erdoğan's victory. While I still support him, the political landscape feels increasingly disillusioning, and I worry about the future of our country.
